title: Information
author: Me
description: May contain spaces but will not contain commas.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship.

title: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
author: Nintendo
description: A fast-paced racing game featuring Mario universe characters.

title: Design Patterns
author: Erich Gamma
description: Design Patterns: Elements of Reusable Object-Oriented Software is a software engineering book describing software design patterns.

title: Inception
author: Christopher Nolan
description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves.

title: Beyond "blah blah blah": exploring the "how" of transformation
author: Julia Bentz; Karen O'Brien & Morgan Scoville-Simonds
description: Calls for transformations are clear and multiple pathways and alternative visions for the future have been defined. We then present insights from the collection of papers that focus on the "how" of transformation. The papers describe different ways of integrating the means and the manner in transformation processes.

title: Can't Contain It
author: Mustard Plug
description: Dave Kirchgessner stated that the album "is strong evolution in our sound and our art while still staying true to the goal of playing party music for punk rockers."

title: Polka Pit
author: The Dreadnoughts
description: The Dreadnoughts are trying to start a revolution and Polka Pit is the soundtrack.

title: Dark Connection
author: Beast in Black
description: Dark Connection is the third studio album by Finnish heavy metal band Beast in Black.

title: Video restoration based on deep learning: a comprehensive survey
author: Claudio Rota; Marco Buzzelli; Simone Bianco & Raimondo Schettini
description: Video restoration concerns the recovery of a clean video sequence starting from its degraded version. In this paper we provide a comprehensive review of the main features of existing video restoration methods based on deep learning.

title: AI-driven enhancement of historical documents
author: Zahra Ziran; Massimo Mecella & Simone Marinai
description: This work contributes to improving the quality of historical document analysis particularly for graphical symbol interpretation in paleographical studies.

title: Ethical Decision Making in Autonomous Vehicles: The AV Ethics Project
author: Katherine Evans; Nelson de Moura; Stéphane Chauvier; Raja Chatila & Ebru Dogan
description: In this article a strategy for AV decision-making is proposed...

title: Enchanted Crystal Railroad
author: Frøggë
description: Another awesome dumbass psuedo band from Christopher Bowes.

title: The central role of trust and perceived risk in the acceptance of autonomous vehicles in an integrated UTAUT model
author: sófia Kenesei; László Kökény; Katalin Ásványi & Melinda Jászberényi
description: We draw implications for theory and practice from our results concentrating mainly on the potential to enhance trust in AVs.

title: Research on Speech Intonation Recognition Technology Based on Deep Learning in Human-Computer Interaction
author: Jiajun Ge; Beize Lin; & Jiaqi Zhang
description: This study focuses on intonation recognition technology.

title: Deep Forgery Defense System for Live Agricultural E-Commerce—A Meta-Learning-Based Dynamic Verification Model for Anchor Voiceprints
author: Zhimin Liang; Zhimin Liang & Zhimin Liang
description: In this paper a deep forgery defense system for live agricultural products e-commerce is constructed to guarantee the authenticity and security of e-commerce.

title: Enhancing Emotional Expressiveness in Voice Conversion Using Seq2Seq and CycleGAN
author: Didi Faouzi; Abdullayev Vugar; Hayal Mohammed R. & Ebrahim E. Elsayed
description: This paper proposes a high-fidelity emotional voice conversion framework that integrates Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq) temporal modeling with Cycle-Consistent Generative Adversarial Networks (CycleGAN).

title: Deepfake Speech Detection Using Perceptual Pathological Features Related to Timbral Attributes and Deep Learning
author: Anuwat Chaiwongyen; Khalid Zaman; Kai Li; Suradej Duangpummet; Jessada Karnjana; Waree Kongprawechnon; & Masashi Unoki
description: This study investigates perceptual speech-pathological features which are commonly used to evaluate the unnaturalness of voice disorders in clinical settings as potential indicators for detecting deepfake speech.

title: Matrix Factorization Techniques for Recommender Systems
author: Yehuda Koren; Robert Bell & Chris Volinsky
description: Matrix factorization models are superior to classic nearest neighbor techniques for producing product recommendations allowing the incorporation of additional information.

title: Artificial intelligence for web development: Perspectives from the industry
author: Pyry Pohjalainen & Juho Vepsäläinen
description: With the introduction of Artificial Intelligence (AI) web development is again at the cusp of a transformation as the latest AI tools might change how to develop for the web yet again. The objective of this study is to look into this phenomenon and understand how AI is changing web development.

title: Understanding Topics API in the Wild: Dubious Usage and Stale Adoption
author: Alberto Verna; Nikhil Jha; Martino Trevisan & Marco Mellia
description: Google's new Topics API is widely discussed as a possible solution to balancing privacy and utility for online targeted advertising. This paper provides a first complete independent study of current adoption of the Topics API technology in the wild to observe whether popular advertising platforms are already deploying it and how.

title: Detection and Classification of Cetacean Echolocation Clicks using Image-based Object Detection Methods applied to Advanced Wavelet-based Transformations
author: Christopher Hauer
description: A challenge in marine bioacoustic analysis is the detection of animal signals for behavioral studies. Manual labeling is too time-consuming to process sufficient data to get reasonable results. Thus an automatic solution to overcome the time-consuming data analysis is necessary.

title: Language-Agnostic Modeling of Source Reliability on Wikipedia
author: Jacopo D'Ignazi; Andreas Kaltenbrunner; Yelena Mejova; Michele Tizzani; Kyriaki Kalimeri; Mariano G. Beiró & Pablo Aragón
description: We present a language-agnostic model designed to assess the reliability of web domains as sources in references across multiple language editions of Wikipedia.

title: Nioh 3
author: Koei Tecmo & Team Ninja
description: Nioh 3 is the eagerly anticipated continuation of the dark samurai action RPG series Nioh.

title: Middle-earth: Shadow of War
author: WB Games & Monolith Productions
description: Go behind enemy lines to forge your army to conquer fortresses and dominate Mordor from within.

title: The Cabin in the Woods
author: Drew Goddard
description: Five friends go for a break at a remote cabin in the woods where they get more than they bargained for.

title: Let That Sh*t Go: Find Peace of Mind and Happiness in Your Everyday
author: Nina Purewal & Kate Petriw
description: A no-nonsense guide to finding calm when life feels like a storm.

title: Attention Seeker: A Neurodivergent Comedian's Guide to Thriving with ADHD
author: Darcy Michael
description: a hilarious memoir with a message about living with adult ADHD from neurodivergent comedian Darcy Michael.

title: The Brain Never Sleeps: Why We Dream and What It Means for Our Health
author: Karen van Kampen
description: We all dream but do we know why we dream? Discover what goes on behind our eyelids and what it means for our health.

title: God of War
author: Sony Interactive Entertainment & SIE Santa Monica Studio
description: After wiping out the gods of Mount Olympus Kratos moves on to the frigid lands of Scandinavia where he and his son must embark on an odyssey across a dangerous world of gods and monsters.

title: Mortal Kombat II
author: Midway Games
description: A fast-paced violent 2D fighting game that continues the storyline of the original Mortal Kombat.

title: The Talos Principle
author: Devolver Digital & Croteam
description: The Talos Principle is a first-person puzzle game in the tradition of philosophical science fiction.

title: Cuphead
author: Studio MDHR
description: Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles.

title: Superman 64
author: Titus Interactive
description: Based on the animated television series Superman: The Animated Series and is the first 3D video game featuring Superman.

title: #FCKCRN
author: Hämatom
description: A raw confrontational EP built on distortion urgency and defiance unfiltered sound for burning through the noise and moving forward.

title: Star Wars Battlefront II
author: Electronic Arts & DICE
description: Experience the first-ever open-world Star Wars game set between the events of The Empire Strikes Back and Return of the Jedi.

title: Swiss Army Man
author: Daniel Kwan & Daniel Scheinert
description: A hopeless man stranded on a deserted island befriends a dead body and together they go on a surreal journey to get home.

title: Tusk
author: Kevin Smith
description: A U.S. podcaster (Justin Long) ventures into the Canadian wilderness to interview an old man (Michael Parks) who has an extraordinary past and the American learns the man has a dark secret involving a walrus.

title: Dragonball Evolution
author: James Wong
description: The young warrior Son Goku sets out on a quest racing against time and the vengeful King Piccolo to collect a set of seven magical orbs that will grant their wielder unlimited power.

title: Breaking Bad
author: Vince Gilligan
description: Mild-mannered high school chemistry teacher Walter White thinks his life can't get much worse.

title: Ōkami HD
author: CAPCOM
description: Experience the critically acclaimed masterpiece with its renowned Sumi-e ink art style in breathtaking high resolution.

title: Fahrenheit 451
author: Ray Bradbury
description: Fahrenheit 451 stands as a classic of world literature set in a bleak dystopian future. Today its message has grown more relevant than ever before.

title: Amélie
author: Jean-Pierre Jeunet
description: It tells the story of Amélie Poulain who is a shy and quirky waitress that decides to change the lives of those around her for the better.

title: Ænima
author: Tool
description: A critically acclaimed album blending progressive metal with philosophical themes.

title: Låt den rätte komma in
author: Tomas Alfredson
description: A haunting Swedish vampire film centered on loneliness and friendship.

title: Debut
author: Björk Guðmundsdóttir
description: The debut studio album by Icelandic singer Björk blending electronic and pop elements.

title: Élite
author: Carlos Montero & Darío Madrona
description: A Spanish-language thriller series centered on class conflict and murder.

title: La vita è bella
author: Roberto Benigni
description: A touching story about a father who uses humor to shield his son from the horrors of war.
